title: Consumer product launch keynote deck
description: Create a visually led launch deck for a consumer product announcement.

question.query: Create an 8-10 slide product launch keynote deck for PulseBand, a consumer wearable that combines recovery tracking, real-time hydration coaching, and emergency contact alerts. The deck should open with a strong audience hook, reveal the product, explain three signature features, include a demo flow, cover ecosystem integrations, pricing and availability, press or customer proof, and end with a clear call to action. The deck should be visual and presentation-ready.
